explanation: This command triggers the Sigma rule by using remote debugging with a wildcard address (*), which bypasses the exclusion for localhost/127.0.0.1. It uses standard syntax and includes all required parameters.
This command also triggers the Sigma rule by specifying a remote debugging address (0.0.0.0), which is not excluded. It uses standard syntax and includes all required parameters.
This command uses IPv6 syntax to specify a remote debugging port on all interfaces, which is not excluded by the Sigma rule. It is a valid variation of the rule's detection pattern.
This command uses the wildcard (*) character to allow remote debugging on all interfaces, which is not excluded by the Sigma rule. It is a valid test case for the rule.
This command uses a specific remote IP address for debugging, which is not excluded by the Sigma rule. It is a valid test case for the rule.
